name: Vampires Edge
description: Vampires on Limit is an incredibly addictive arcade hit where simple rules yield hours of gripping chaos. Your goal is clear from the very first second: survive as long as possible against endless hordes of night undead.
instructions: In this game your character attacks automatically You dont need to press the shoot button-instead your entire focus is on survival tactics Dodge hordes of monsters collect experience from defeated enemies and make the most important choice
